content.description:
This [App Page](item://c0c0c0c0-0038-0000-0000-000000000000) lets you quickly create a [Nested Hobson Instance](item://c0c0c0c0-0037-0000-0000-000000000000).

Choose which items to include in the new instance. Import just the bare kernel if you want to experience the app before any userland items are added; import everything if you want a fully functional nested playground.
